description_long: This ice cream shop is a simple, rectangular building with a flat roof and a deep navy blue exterior. The structure is boxy and unadorned, with no visible windows or doors on most sides, except for a small protruding rectangular element on one side that may serve as a service window or counter. The surfaces are smooth and uniform, lacking any decorative trim, signage, or architectural embellishments. The building appears solid and monolithic, with no visible transparency or openings for entry in these views. The color palette is minimal, dominated by a single dark blue tone, giving the shop a modern and understated appearance. There are no visible outdoor seating areas, signage, or ice cream imagery present on the exterior.
description: A minimalist, box-shaped ice cream shop with a flat roof and a solid navy blue exterior, featuring a small protruding element on one side.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, featureless navy blue facade with a slight vertical mark near the bottom center.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a small, rectangular protrusion extending from the left wall, possibly a service window or counter.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely flat, uninterrupted navy blue surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another small rectangular protrusion, mirroring the left side, extending from the right wall.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A small rectangular service window or counter is present on both the left and right sides of the building, protruding outward and accessible from the exterior.
